sp_widget.description: Manager UI for the Auto-Assigner: tabs of assigners, status, Start/Stop, roster lists.
sp_widget.name: Auto-Assigner Main
sp_widget.template:
Auto-Assigner

Instance time: {{c.instanceClockDisplay}}

No auto-assigners visible. You need to be in an assignment group that has one configured.

{{a.name}}

Assignment group: {{a.assignment_group}}
Next run in {{a.countdown}} {{a.running ? 'Running' : 'Stopped'}} {{a.inActiveWindow ? 'Active window' : 'Outside active window'}}

Working ({{(a.roster | filter:{working:true}).length}})

  • {{r.analyst}} {{r.shift || 'No shift'}}
  • Nobody marked working

Not working ({{(a.roster | filter:{working:false}).length}})

  • {{r.analyst}}
  • Empty

Active window

Tickets are only assigned (or unassigned) inside the active window. Outside it the assigner is idle even when Running is on.

Round-robin order ({{a.roundRobinOrder.length}}) (currently-eligible analysts in next-up order)

Nobody is currently eligible (no working analysts on shift right now).

  1. {{r.analyst}} {{r.shift_name}} last assigned: {{r.last_assigned_at || 'never'}}

Ticket types ({{(a.ticketTypes | filter:{enabled:true}).length}}) (picks up unassigned tickets of these types)

Active ({{(a.ticketTypes | filter:{enabled:true}).length}})

  • {{t.label}} {{t.table_name}}
  • No ticket types active

Available ({{(a.ticketTypes | filter:{enabled:false} | filter:a.ticketTypeFilter).length}})

  • {{t.label}} {{t.table_name}}

Showing first 50. Type to filter.

Unassign from not-working analysts

Apply to these ticket types ({{(a.reassignTypes | filter:{enabled:true}).length}})

Active ({{(a.reassignTypes | filter:{enabled:true}).length}})

  • {{t.label}} {{t.table_name}}
  • No reassign types active

Available ({{(a.reassignTypes | filter:{enabled:false} | filter:a.reassignTypeFilter).length}})

  • {{t.label}} {{t.table_name}}

Showing first 50. Type to filter.

When a ticket is in one of these states ({{(a.reassignStates | filter:{enabled:true}).length}}) (and assigned to a not-working analyst, unassign it)

Add a ticket type above to see its possible states here.

Active ({{(a.reassignStates | filter:{enabled:true}).length}})

  • {{s.label}} {{s.table_name}}
  • No states active

Available ({{(a.reassignStates | filter:{enabled:false} | filter:a.reassignStateFilter).length}})

  • {{s.label}} {{s.table_name}}
